name: Rose Snuffle Plush Rope Dog Toy - Boots & Barkley™
description:
Your four-legged friend will love to play with this Rose Snuffle Plush Rope Dog Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This plush toy features a red rose flower on top, which opens into multiple petals featuring cross sections to hold their favorite treats. Plus, it has a green twisted rope with a knot, making it ideal for chewing and tug-of-war.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
